description: Use this API to calculate PSSE extended term dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = mrun(option, tpause, nprt, nplt, crtplt)
python_syntax: ierr = mrun(option, tpause, nprt, nplt, crtplt)

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Network solution convergence monitor option. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: tpause
parameters.description: Value of simulated time at which the simulation should next pause. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: nprt
parameters.description: Number of time steps between the printing of the channel values. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: nplt
parameters.description: Number of time steps between the writing of the output channel values to the current channel output file. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: crtplt
parameters.description: Number of time steps between the plotting of those channel values that have been designated as crt output channels. (input; unchanged by default).

option.description: print the convergence monitor only if it is enabled via the CM interrupt control code.

error_codes.description: long time step mode threshold is at or below intermediate mode threshold.
activity MSTR needs to be executed.
error opening the current Channel Output File.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
